title: CaveBlock - Underground Survival
description: Extreme underground survival. Start deep in a cave with nothing - dig, mine, and build your way to the surface.
body:
# ⛏️ CaveBlock — Can You Dig Your Way Out?

You wake up deep underground. No sky, no trees, no surface. Just stone in every direction.

CaveBlock flips the SkyBlock formula upside down — literally. Instead of starting above the void and building down, you start buried underground and must mine, dig, and tunnel your way toward the surface. Every block you break is progress. Every cave you discover is an opportunity.

## 🎮 How It Works

- 🪨 **Start underground** — surrounded by stone, deepslate, and darkness
- ⛏️ **Mine everything** — resources are earned through digging, not generators
- 🔦 **Discover caves** — natural cave systems, ores, and lava await
- ☀️ **Reach the surface** — break through to the sky and build above ground
- 👥 **Teams** — work together to excavate faster

## ⚙️ Features

- **Inverted SkyBlock** — a fresh take for players tired of void islands
- **Configurable world** — set the depth, block types, cave frequency, and ore distribution
- **Full protection system** — island boundaries, team permissions, and protection flags
- **All BentoBox addons** — challenges, levels, warps, and more work with CaveBlock
- **Free and open source**

## 📦 Installation

Requires **BentoBox** on a **Paper** server.

1. Install [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox)
2. Place `CaveBlock.jar` into `plugins/BentoBox/addons/`
3. Restart
4. `/cave` to start playing

📖 Docs: [docs.bentobox.world](https://docs.bentobox.world) | 💬 Discord: [discord.gg/BentoBoxWorld](https://discord.gg/BentoBoxWorld) | 🐛 Issues: [GitHub](https://github.com/BentoBoxWorld/CaveBlock/issues)
